# Extração: 05-10X Facebook Management Checklist

- **Fonte:** 05-10X Facebook Management Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 2.67 MB

---

Create lists of minor and major influencers and follow all
Explore most active followers of pages and notice patterns
Join all relevant groups specific to your niche and observe
Create target demographic, interest, and behavior lists
Create a special page or funnel with offer to send people to
INITIAL STRATEGY
Check personal updates (Notifications tab)
Like and reply to page comments (hide if needed)
Check Page notifications and take action as needed
Check Messenger messages to page and reply
Check on Boosted posts in the Ad Center
Post real world updates to profile and page (as inspired)
Add content and participate in your own group (optional)
DAILY ACTIVITY
Plan out content postings using Content Planner sheet
Schedule content to post regularly (weekly or monthly)
Share relevant/successful posts to our personal profile
Review statistics in Page Insights and adjust strategy
Check page support inbox for any potential issues
Comment on other relevant page posts as Page (optional)
Participate in relevant Facebook groups (optional)
WEEKLY/MONTHLY ACTIVITY
Keep going … consistency is the key!
